name: Minimal Python project (edge case)
description: Minimal single-file Python project with no tests, no API, no config, no linter. Tests graceful handling of sparse projects and conditional file generation.
expected_behavior: Handles minimal project without errors or crashes
Compression script produces valid JSON summary with minimal data
Generates only code-style.md (always generated) and possibly error-handling.md
Does NOT generate testing.md (no test files detected)
Does NOT generate api-design.md (no API/web project detected)
Does NOT generate architecture.md (no clear architecture pattern)
Does NOT generate debugging.md (no logging library or observability tools)
Does NOT generate security.md (no web/API project detected)
Does not invent rules without codebase evidence
